boosts.name: Advanced Training
boosts.description: Advanced Training <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Once per Round, when a Friendly Support Unit activates a Special Ability that costs CP, resolve that ability with its CP cost reduced by 1 (to a minimum of 0). Do not Exhaust this card.

boosts.name: Vehicle Weapons
boosts.description: Vehicle Weapons <Active> <Assault Phase>: The active Mechanical Unit’s first Ranged Weapon used gain CRITICAL HIT (1).

boosts.name: Vehicle Plating
boosts.description: Vehicle Plating <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Use before a Friendly Mechanical Unit makes an Armour Roll. That Unit gains TOUGH (1) for this roll.

boosts.name: Go! Go! Go!
boosts.description: Go! Go! Go! <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Biological Unit performs a 2" Move action. This does not count towards its action limit.

boosts.name: Go! Go! Go!
boosts.description: Go! Go! Go! <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Biological Unit performs a 2" Move action. This does not count towards its action limit.

boosts.name: Armed and Ready
boosts.description: Armed and Ready <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Biological Unit Deploys from any table edge that is not a player's Entry Edge. No model may be set up Within 10" of any Enemy model. This ability cannot be used if another Friendly Biological Unit has already been Deployed this Round.

boosts.name: Go! Go! Go!
boosts.description: Go! Go! Go! <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Biological Unit performs a 2" Move action. This does not count towards its action limit.

boosts.name: Let's Have a Blast!
boosts.description: Let's Have a Blast! <Active> <Assault Phase>: The active Biological Unit’s first Ranged Weapon used gain ANTI-EVADE (1).
Strap in! <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active, Unengaged Ground Unit is returned to Reserves instead of performing an action.
boosts.name: Strap in!
Ready For Dust-off
boosts.description: Ready For Dust-off <Active> <Movement Phase>: Set a Faction Indicator anywhere on the battlefield more than 10" away from any Enemy model. At the End of the Round, the controlling player may Deploy one Ground Unit from Reserves in base-to-base contact with this Faction Indicator.
Infantry Weapons <Active> <Assault Phase>: The active Biological Unit’s first Ranged Weapon used gains CRITICAL HIT (1).
boosts.name: Infantry Weapons

boosts.description: Infantry Armor <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Use before a Friendly Biological Unit makes an Armour Roll. That Unit gains TOUGH (1) for this roll.
boosts.name: Infantry Armor

boosts.description: Field Repair <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Mechanical Unit resolves the HEAL (2) effect.
boosts.name: Field Repair
ComSat Station
boosts.description: ComSat Station <Active> <Movement Phase>: Select one table edge that is not a player’s Entry Edge. Until the End of the Round, Enemy Units cannot Deploy from that edge.

boosts.name: Scanner Sweep
boosts.description: Scanner Sweep <Active> <Movement Phase>: Set a Faction Indicator anywhere on the battlefield. While Enemy Units are Within 6" of this Faction Indicator, they lose HIDDEN Status.
Additional Supply Depots <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Unit’s Supply Value is improved by 1 for Controlling and Contesting Mission Markers and completing objectives.
boosts.name: Additional Supply Depots

boosts.description: Speed on Creep <Passive> <Any Phase>: If the active Friendly Zerg Unit is ON CREEP, increase its Speed characteristic by 1.
boosts.name: Speed on Creep

boosts.description: Living Glob of Tissue <Passive> <Any Phase>: Creep Tumor tokens have STAY IN PLAY and DISPLACEMENT.
boosts.name: Living Glob of Tissue
Creep Removal
boosts.description: Creep Removal <Passive> <Any Phase>: If an Enemy Unit ends a Move, Deploy, Run, Charge or Disengage action Within 1" of a Friendly Creep Tumor token, remove that token from the battlefield.

boosts.name: Extended Claws
boosts.description: Extended Claws <Active> <Assault Phase>: The active Unit gains a +1 Modifier to all IMPACT Hit Rolls.

boosts.name: Carapace
boosts.description: Carapace <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Use before a Friendly Unit makes an Armour Roll. That Unit gains TOUGH (1) for this roll.

boosts.name: Lie in Wait
boosts.description: Lie in Wait <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active, Unengaged Ground Unit gains the Burrowed Status.
Creep Spread <Active> <Movement Phase>: Set a Creep Tumor token on the battlefield Within 6" (Line of Sight is not required) of either a Friendly Entry Edge or an existing Friendly Creep Tumor token.
boosts.name: Creep Spread
Missile Attacks
boosts.description: Missile Attacks <Active> <Assault Phase>: The active Unit’s first Ranged Weapon used gains PRECISION (1).
Predation <Active> <Any Phase>: The active Unit’s Close Combat Weapons gain INSTANT.
boosts.name: Predation

boosts.description: Creep Spread <Active> <Movement Phase>: Set a Creep Tumor token on the battlefield Within 6" (Line of Sight is not required) of either a Friendly Entry Edge or an existing Friendly Creep Tumor token.
boosts.name: Creep Spread
Malevolent Matriarch
boosts.description: Malevolent Matriarch <Passive> <Assault Phase>: If the active Friendly Zerg Unit declares a Charge action while ON CREEP, it gains +1 Modifier to IMPACT Hit Rolls.

boosts.name: Living Glob of Tissue
boosts.description: Living Glob of Tissue <Passive> <Any Phase>: Creep Tumor tokens have STAY IN PLAY and DISPLACEMENT.
Creep Removal <Passive> <Any Phase>: If an Enemy Unit ends a Move, Deploy, Run, Charge or Disengage action Within 1" of a Friendly Creep Tumor token, remove that token from the battlefield.
boosts.name: Creep Removal

Ventral Sacs
boosts.description: Ventral Sacs <Active> <Movement Phase>: Set a Faction Indicator anywhere on the battlefield more than 10" away from any Enemy model. At the End of the Round, the controlling player may Deploy one Ground Unit from Reserves in base-to-base contact with this Faction Indicator.

boosts.name: Pneumatized Carapace
boosts.description: Pneumatized Carapace <Reaction> <Assault Phase>: Use after a Friendly Unit rolls a D6 for Charge Distance. Roll an additional D6 and use the higher result to calculate the total Charge Distance.
Oversight Mode <Active> <Movement Phase>: Set a Faction Indicator anywhere on the battlefield. While Enemy Units are Within 6" of this Faction Indicator, they lose HIDDEN Status.
boosts.name: Oversight Mode
Nasty Surprise
boosts.description: Nasty Surprise <Active> <Assault Phase>: The active Ground Unit loses the Burrowed Status.
Feral Rage <Active> <Combat Phase>: The active Unit’s first Close Combat Weapon used gains PRECISION (2).
boosts.name: Feral Rage
Feral Rage
boosts.description: Feral Rage <Active> <Combat Phase>: The active Unit’s first Close Combat Weapon used gains PRECISION (2).

boosts.name: Timing Push
boosts.description: Timing Push <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Zergling Unit Deploys from any table edge that is not a Player’s Entry Edge. This action must end more than 10" away from any Enemy model.

boosts.name: Ground Weapons
boosts.description: Ground Weapons <Active> <Assault Phase>: The active Ground Unit’s first Ranged Weapon used gains CRITICAL HIT (1).
Ground Armor <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Use before a Friendly Ground Unit makes an Armour Roll. That Unit gains TOUGH (1) for this roll.
boosts.name: Ground Armor
Quick Strikes
boosts.description: Quick Strikes <Active> <Combat Phase>: The active Unit’s first Close Combat Weapon used gains PRECISION (2).

boosts.name: Zealous Charge
boosts.description: Zealous Charge <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Unit gains BUFF Speed (2).
Quick Strikes <Active> <Combat Phase>: The active Unit’s first Close Combat Weapon used gains PRECISION (2).
boosts.name: Quick Strikes
Ancient Pride
boosts.description: Ancient Pride <Active> <Any Phase>: The active Unit’s first Weapon used gains INSTANT.
Strategic Recall <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active, Unengaged Ground Unit is returned to Reserves instead of performing an action.
boosts.name: Strategic Recall
Surveillance
boosts.description: Surveillance <Active> <Movement Phase>: Set a Faction Indicator anywhere on the battlefield. While Enemy Units are Within 6" of this Faction Indicator, they lose HIDDEN Status.
Gravitic Boosters <Reaction> <Assault Phase>: Use after a Friendly Unit rolls a D6 for Charge Distance. Add 1 to the Charge Distance for this Unit.
boosts.name: Gravitic Boosters
Photon Overcharge
boosts.description: Photon Overcharge <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Use when an Enemy Unit enters the battlefield from Reserves via a location other than its own Entry Edge. That Unit immediately suffers HITS 3 (1).
Strategic Recall <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active, Unengaged Ground Unit is returned to Reserves instead of performing an action.
boosts.name: Strategic Recall

boosts.description: Guardian Shell <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Use before a Friendly Ground Unit makes an Armour Roll. That Unit gains DODGE (2) for this roll.
boosts.name: Guardian Shell
Weapons of the Firstborn
boosts.description: Weapons of the Firstborn <Active> <Assault Phase>: The active Ground Unit’s first Ranged Weapon used gains BUFF Range (4).
Veil of Shadows <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Use after a Friendly Unit resolves a PLACE effect. That Unit immediately resolves the HEAL (2) effect.
boosts.name: Veil of Shadows
Quick Strikes
boosts.description: Quick Strikes <Active> <Combat Phase>: The active Unit’s first Close Combat Weapon used gains PRECISION (2).

boosts.name: Warp In
boosts.description: Warp In <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Ground Unit Deploys from any table edge that is not a player’s Entry Edge. This deployment must end more than 10" away from any Enemy model. The controlling player cannot use this ability if another Friendly Ground Unit has already Deployed this Round.
Phase <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Unit resolves the PLACE (3) effect.
boosts.name: Phase

boosts.description: Warp Conduit <Active> <Movement Phase>: Set a Faction Indicator anywhere on the battlefield more than 10" away from any Enemy model. At the End of the Round, the controlling player may Deploy one Ground Unit from Reserves in base-to-base contact with this Faction Indicator.
boosts.name: Warp Conduit
Mass Recall
boosts.description: Mass Recall <Active> <Movement Phase>: Once per Game. Set a Faction Indicator anywhere on the battlefield. All Friendly Protoss Units Within 6" of this Faction Indicator are removed from the battlefield and returned to Reserves.
Dae’Uhl <Reaction> <Any Phase>: When a Friendly Unit receives Damage, reduce the Total Damage by 2 (to a minimum of 1).
boosts.name: Dae’Uhl
Pylon Warp-In
boosts.description: Pylon Warp-In <Active> <Movement Phase>: If there is no Friendly Pylon on the battlefield, set a Friendly Pylon Unit anywhere on the GROUND LEVEL of the battlefield more than 10" away from any Enemy model. This Round, the Pylon is not eligible to use its Special Abilities (excluding Structure).
Bound by the Khala <Active> <Movement Phase>: At the end of the active Unit’s Activation, select one other Friendly Unit eligible to Activate in the current Phase. Immediately Activate that Unit.
boosts.name: Bound by the Khala
Omega Network
boosts.description: Omega Network <Active> <Movement Phase>: If there is no Friendly Omega Worm on the battlefield, set a Friendly Omega Worm Unit anywhere on GROUND LEVEL of the battlefield, more than 10" away from any Enemy model. This Round, the Omega Worm is not eligible to use its Special Abilities (excluding Structure).

boosts.name: Wild Mutation
boosts.description: Wild Mutation <Active> <Any Phase>: If the active unit is ON CREEP, the Unit gains BUFF Speed (1) and its first Weapon used gains PRECISION (1).
Zerg Creep <Passive> <Any Phase>: During Army Building, select exactly one Creep Card and add it to their Army List, paying its listed cost (if any).
boosts.name: Zerg Creep
Rapid Burrowing
boosts.description: Rapid Burrowing <Active> <Movement Phase>: Select one Friendly, Unengaged Ground Zerg Unit on the battlefield. That Unit gains the Burrowed Status, even if it has already been Activated this Round.

boosts.name: Brood Instinct
boosts.description: Brood Instinct <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Use before a Friendly Unit makes an Evade Roll. Apply a +1 Modifier to that roll.
Zerg Creep <Passive> <Any Phase>: During Army Building, select exactly one Creep Card and add it to their Army List, paying its listed cost (if any).
boosts.name: Zerg Creep

boosts.description: Rapid Ingress <Active> <Movement Phase>: Set a Friendly Point Defence Drone Unit anywhere on the battlefield, more than 1" away from any Enemy model. Remove this Unit at the End of the Round.
boosts.name: Rapid Ingress
Ready for Pickup?
boosts.description: Ready for Pickup? <Active> <Movement Phase>: Once per Game. The active Unit resolves the PLACE (12) effect. Models set by this effect cannot be set up Within the Engagement Range of any Enemy Unit. This resolves instead of performing a standard action.
Tactical Retreat <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Unit ignores the Disengage penalty for the remainder of the Round.
boosts.name: Tactical Retreat

boosts.description: Terran Tenacity <Active> <Movement Phase>: Once per Game. Immediately claim the First Player Marker. No other player may claim the First Player Marker for the remainder of this Phase.
boosts.name: Terran Tenacity
